briefdescription.para: < The following restrictions define the memory used for the ECC variables The design sometimes requires two extra digits
< Prototype declarations for third-party APIs for Elliptic curve related operations

memberdef.argsstring: (const EcdsaCrvInfo *CrvInfo, u8 *z, u32 zlen, const EcdsaKey *Key, const EcdsaSign *Sign)
memberdef.name: Ecdsa_VerifySign

memberdef.argsstring: (const EcdsaCrvInfo *CrvInfo, const u8 *z, u32 zlen, const u8 *D, const u8 *K, const EcdsaSign *Sign)
memberdef.name: Ecdsa_GenerateSign

memberdef.argsstring: (EcdsaCrvInfo *CrvInfo, const unsigned char *Secret, const EcdsaKey *Public, unsigned char *Result)
memberdef.name: Ecdsa_CDH_Q

briefdescription.para: < ECDSA compact code for RSA5X, "quiet" version API definitions
Return value in case of success.
